mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('files') FROM dual
INSERT INTO files (id, user_id, created_on) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)

SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('docs') FROM dual
INSERT INTO docs (id, project_id, title, content, doc_type, file_id, user_id, created_on) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{doctype}, #{fileId}, #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE docs SET title = #{title}, doc_type = #{doctype}, content = #{content}, edited_on = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT D.ID, D.TITLE, D.DOC_TYPE AS DOCTYPE, D.USER_ID, U.NAME AS USERNAME, D.CREATED_ON AS createdOn FROM DOCS D LEFT JOIN USERS U ON D.USER_ID = U.ID WHERE D.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY D.CREATED_ON DESC
SELECT D.ID, D.TITLE, D.DOC_TYPE AS DOCTYPE, D.CONTENT, D.USER_ID, U.NAME AS USERNAME, D.CREATED_ON AS createdOn FROM DOCS D LEFT JOIN USERS U ON D.USER_ID = U.ID WHERE D.ID = #{id}

SELECT fd.id, fd.file_id as fileId, fd.original_name as name, fd.stored_name as storedName, fd.extension, fd.file_size as "size" FROM file_detail fd INNER JOIN docs d ON fd.file_id = d.file_id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND fd.is_delete = 'F0' AND fd.version = ( SELECT MAX(version) FROM file_detail WHERE file_id = fd.file_id AND is_delete = 'F0' )
SELECT file_id FROM docs WHERE id = #{id}
